  • Constructor Details

    • MessagingChannelCommunicator

      public MessagingChannelCommunicator(com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer server, org.slf4j.Logger logger)

  • Method Details

    • queueMute

      public void queueMute(Mute mute, int type) throws Exception
      Tries to send the specified muteData to all registered servers. As a plugin message can only be sent if a player is connected to the server, the message will be queued if no player is connected to the server and will be sent as soon as a player connects to the server.
      Parameters:
      mute - the mute data to send
      type - the type of the mute (MuteData.ADD, MuteData.REMOVE or MuteData.UPDATE)
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if the mute data could not be serialized
      Exception

    • onChooseInitialServer

      public void onChooseInitialServer(com.velocitypowered.api.event.player.ServerPostConnectEvent event)

    • serializeMuteData

      public byte[] serializeMuteData(MuteData muteData) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException

      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
